GoAddress Next.js project instructions.

Stack:
- Next.js 14 App Router
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS
- Framer Motion
- Inter via next/font/google

Implementation notes:
- Keep the site dark by default and use the GoAddress color palette from tailwind.config.ts.
- Preserve the single-page landing structure in app/page.tsx.
- Reuse the shared UI primitives in components/ui for buttons, badges, and code blocks.
- Keep hero, trust, how-it-works, stats, and contact sections anchor-friendly for smooth scrolling.
- Prefer concise, production-ready copy and avoid introducing placeholder content.
